_about: Golden Q&A set for Milestone 3 RAG eval. Each answerable item lists `answer_spans`: verbatim substrings that appear in the cited filing's content_text at the passage that answers the question. Retrieval recall@k = at least one retrieved chunk contains an answer_span. Unanswerable items (answer_spans empty) must make the model abstain. All spans are checked to exist in the real filing before scoring; if a filing is re-ingested and text shifts, the eval will flag a stale span rather than score against a phantom.

questions.question: When does Apple's fiscal year end?
questions.expected_answer: Apple's fiscal year is the 52- or 53-week period ending on the last Saturday of September.

questions.question: Where is final assembly of Apple's hardware products performed?
answer_spans: final assembly of substantially all of the Company
questions.expected_answer: Substantially all of Apple's hardware product final assembly is performed by outsourcing partners located primarily in Asia.

questions.question: Does Apple depend on single or limited sources for some components?
questions.expected_answer: Yes — some components are currently obtained from single or limited sources.

questions.question: What does Apple say about legal proceedings and claims arising in the ordinary course of business?
answer_spans: subject to various legal proceedings and claims that arise in the ordinary course of business
questions.expected_answer: Apple is subject to various legal proceedings and claims arising in the ordinary course of business, the outcomes of which are uncertain.

questions.question: Why does Apple invest heavily in research and development?
answer_spans: the industries in which the Company competes are characterized by rapid
timely introduction of innovative new products
questions._span_note: Both spans are clauses of Apple's stated R&D rationale (Item 1); chunking split the sentence, so either retrieved chunk correctly answers the question.
questions.expected_answer: Because the industries Apple competes in are characterized by rapid technological advances, its ability to compete depends on the timely introduction of innovative new products — so continued R&D is critical.

questions.question: What factors affect Apple's effective tax rate?
answer_spans: effective tax rates are affected by changes in the mix of earnings
Provision for Income Taxes and Effective Tax Rate
questions._span_note: Risk-factor sentence (Item 1A) and the income-tax note (Item 8) both answer this; the note's rate reconciliation is the canonical source of the factors.
questions.expected_answer: Apple's effective tax rate is affected by the mix of earnings across jurisdictions with differing statutory rates and other items detailed in the income-tax note's rate reconciliation.

questions.question: Is Apple exposed to foreign exchange rate fluctuations?
questions.expected_answer: Yes — Apple cites fluctuations in foreign exchange rates among the macroeconomic factors that can affect its business.

questions.question: What does Microsoft's Intelligent Cloud segment include?
answer_spans: server products and cloud services that power modern business
questions.expected_answer: The Intelligent Cloud segment includes public, private, and hybrid server products and cloud services that power modern business and developers.

questions.question: What is Microsoft's stated ambition for the intelligent cloud and intelligent edge?
answer_spans: intelligent cloud and intelligent edge platform
questions.expected_answer: To build the intelligent cloud and intelligent edge platform as a foundation for customers' digital workloads.

questions.question: What categories of devices does Microsoft mention, including gaming?
questions.expected_answer: PCs, tablets, gaming and entertainment consoles, and other intelligent devices and related accessories.

questions.question: What was Apple's smartphone market share in India during fiscal 2025?
How many daily active users does the App Store have?
What is the exact annual base salary of Microsoft's Chief Financial Officer?
